zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hudleston於大約1420年出生在英國波藍德米洛姆時，他的父親Sir Richard Hudleston11418歲，母親Margaret Harrington32歲。他和Lady Mary Fenwyke至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1493年11月6日在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國波藍德米洛姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hudleston于大约1420年出生在英国波藍德米洛姆时，他的父亲Sir Richard Hudleston11418岁，母亲Margaret Harrington32岁。他和Lady Mary Fenwyke至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1493年11月6日在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国波藍德米洛姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hudleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Huddleston
meanings: English: habitational name from Huddleston (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Hūdel (genitive Hūdeles; see Huddle ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hudleston was born about 1420, in Millom, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Richard Hudleston, was 11418 and his mother, Margaret Harrington, was 32. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Mary Fenwyke. He died on 6 November 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Millom, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hudleston est né environ 1420, à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Hudleston, avait 11418 ans et sa mère, Margaret Harrington, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Mary Fenwyke. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hudleston um 1420 in Millom, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Hudleston 11418 und seine Mutter Margaret Harrington 32. Er hatte mit Lady Mary Fenwyke mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1493 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Millom, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hudleston è nato il circa 1420 nel Millom, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Hudleston, aveva 11418 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Harrington, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Mary Fenwyke. Morì il 6 novembre 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Millom, Cumberland, England.

ja.Millom Castle, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドミロム
ja.Millom, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドミロム
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hudlestonが約1420年にイギリスクウンバーランドミロムで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Hudlestonは11418歳，母Margaret Harringtonは32歳であった。彼はLady Mary Fenwykeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1493年11月6日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドミロムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hudleston(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 쿠벌랜드 미롬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Hudleston(은)는 11418세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Harrington(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Lady Mary Fenwyke(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 11월 6일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드 미롬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hudleston nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Hudleston, tinha 11418 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Harrington, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Lady Mary Fenwyke. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hudleston родился около 1420 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Hudleston было 11418 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Harrington, 32. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Lady Mary Fenwyke. Он умер 6 ноября 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hudleston nació aproximadamente 1420, en Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Hudleston, tenía 11418 años y su mamá, Margaret Harrington, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Lady Mary Fenwyke. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
